summary: Shopify App Bridge / Embedded App integration fully tested. Backend: 13/13 tests passed - embedded dashboard endpoint returns trending_products/recent_exports/radar_detections, session-token endpoint correctly rejects invalid/empty tokens with 401/400. Frontend: /embedded page with shop param shows dashboard with products, stats, radar alerts; /embedded without shop param correctly shows 'No Shop Detected' error; /shopify-app page has all required sections including embedded-preview-card. GDPR endpoints verified (return 401 when HMAC required). WebSocket regression passed.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/embedded/dashboard?shop=test.myshopify.com returns 200 with trending_products, recent_exports, radar_detections
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/embedded/dashboard without shop param returns 400/422
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/embedded/dashboard with empty shop returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/session-token with empty body returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/session-token with empty token returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/session-token with invalid token returns 401
BACKEND: POST /api/shopify/app/session-token with tampered JWT returns 401
BACKEND: GDPR endpoints exist and enforce HMAC verification
BACKEND: GET /api/shopify/app/info returns 200 with app metadata
BACKEND: WebSocket endpoint /api/notifications/ws exists (regression)
FRONTEND: /embedded?shop=demo.myshopify.com&host=test loads embedded dashboard
FRONTEND: Embedded dashboard shows TrendScout header with shop name badge
FRONTEND: Embedded dashboard stats: 10 trending products, 0 exports, 5 radar alerts
FRONTEND: Embedded dashboard shows 'Top Products to Launch' section with product list
FRONTEND: Embedded dashboard shows 'Radar Detections' section
FRONTEND: /embedded without shop param shows 'No Shop Detected' error state
FRONTEND: Error state has correct data-testid='embedded-no-shop'
FRONTEND: /shopify-app page has hero title 'TrendScout for Shopify'
FRONTEND: /shopify-app page shows 6 feature cards
FRONTEND: /shopify-app page shows 4 installation steps
FRONTEND: /shopify-app page has GDPR & Compliance section
FRONTEND: /shopify-app page has Embedded App Mode section
FRONTEND: /shopify-app page has embedded-preview-card with data-testid
FRONTEND: /shopify-app API docs toggle works correctly

verified_features.verification: Returns trending products, recent exports, radar detections for shop
Verifies Shopify session tokens, rejects invalid/empty with 401/400
Shows dashboard with shop param, error state without shop param
Embedded App Mode section with preview card visible
Dynamically loads App Bridge CDN when inside iframe with shop/host params
verified_features.status: VERIFIED (code review - not testable outside iframe)

critical_code_review_comments: App Bridge CDN only loads when inside iframe (window.self !== window.top) - correct behavior for security
Session token verification uses PyJWT decode with SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET - proper security
GDPR endpoints correctly enforce HMAC when SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET is set
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing products in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopify App Bridge integration verified: (1) GET /api/shopify/app/embedded/dashboard returns trending products, exports, radar detections for any shop. (2) POST /api/shopify/app/session-token validates Shopify JWTs using SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET. (3) Frontend /embedded page shows dashboard with shop param or error without. (4) App Bridge CDN script dynamically loads only inside iframe (Shopify Admin). (5) GDPR endpoints require valid HMAC when client secret is configured.
